name: Carrot & Yogurt Relish
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp fresh red or green pepper (or 1/2 tsp crushed hot red pepper flakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the carrot into coarse shreds using a hand grater or food processor, yielding about 1 cup.
2. Place the grated carrots in boiling water and cook for approximately 30 seconds. Drain well before proceeding.
3. Combine the yogurt, carrots, onion, sugar, ground cumin, and hot pepper (either fresh or flakes) in a bowl. Mix until evenly distributed. Serve chilled.
